items.title: Make introductions to Banxware and SumUp for Simone ahead of Berlin trip
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 29: 'I'd be especially grateful for introductions to the teams at Banxware and SumUp, as both are high on our list of companies we'd love to meet while we're in Berlin.'

items.title: Share Berlin event and dinner recommendations with Simone
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 29: 'if there are any dinners, side events, or parties in Berlin that you think are especially worth attending, I'd love your recommendations.'

items.title: Follow up with Roy Katmor on Orchid round dynamics after Jake's May 27 check-in
items.context: Email from Jake on May 27: 'Just following up here. Would love to hear the latest on round dynamics.' Roy's prior reply (May 6) noted he passed on a TS and expects more in coming weeks.

items.title: Debrief on Opti catch-up call re: first deal close and preemptive internal round
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 28: 'We closed our first deal earlier this week... existing investors want to preempt with an internal quick round. Is it worth to catch up for 10 mins?' Richie scheduled a call for May 29 at 2pm ET.

items.title: Prep for NYTW / CISO Breakfast with Thoropass on Jun 2
items.context: Calendar event 'HOLD: NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on Jun 2 at 114 Crosby St with Thoropass team (claire.lamb, javier, sam) and Fin Capital team.

items.title: Prep for Poolside quarterly check-in on Jun 3
items.context: Calendar event 'Poolside <> Fin: Quarterly Check In' on Jun 3 with Poolside team (paul, jeff, isaac) — recurring portfolio company review.

items.title: Prep for Certa bi-monthly catch-up on Jun 4
items.context: Calendar event 'Bi-monthly Catch-up: Certa <> Fin Capital' on Jun 4 with Certa team (theo, brian.shaw, emilia, jag) — recurring portfolio company review.
